About Me
Get to know me
Operations leader with 8+ years of experience building scalable, automated systems across complex supply chain environments. Currently leading three workstreams under GSF Central Operations at Amazon India — Remote Ops (394+ stores, 220+ cities, ~1.8M monthly deliveries, 98.8% OTP), DSP Payments (₹875M+ quarterly, 600+ sites, 150+ partners, zero escalations), and Bharat 2.0 Quick Commerce (15-45 min delivery pilot across Tier 2/3 markets). Over 5+ years at Amazon, progressed from Operation Executive to Remote Ops Manager — automating cash closure TAT by 90%, redesigning clusters to cut touchpoints by 80%, and delivering 608K+ Jupiter orders at 98.7% OTP. Led the highest store expansion in Hybrid Stores history — 148 launches in one year, growing 156 to 274 stores across 186+ cities. Prior to Amazon: outbound logistics at Mahindra Logistics for M&M's automotive division (150+ transporters, OTD 75%→95%) and MIS at ICICI Bank. Outside of work, passionate about giving back to society through meaningful volunteering — initiated the SHG Community Bag Repair program across 4 cities, partnering with NGOs to empower marginalized communities while driving operational sustainability.

Leadership Principles
How I lead
Ownership
Redesigned RO cluster model from 8 mixed clusters into 2 clear zones — reduced communication touchpoints by 80%, improved Job Satisfaction from 63% to 81%. Took accountability for high-risk DSP Payment process, executing payouts error-free while building automation roadmap.
Leaders are owners. They think long term and don't sacrifice long-term value for short-term results. They act on behalf of the entire company, beyond just their own team. They never say "that's not my job."
View Definition →← Back to My Example
Deliver Results
Delivered 608K+ Jupiter orders at 98.7% OTP (170 bps above goal) and 70K+ Prime Day orders at 97.9% OTP. Expanded network from 194 to 364 stores while operating below approved headcount. Improved MRL OTP from 94.0% to 98.2% through structured KT sessions and daily bridges.
Leaders focus on the key inputs for their business and deliver them with the right quality and in a timely fashion. Despite setbacks, they rise to the occasion and never settle.
View Definition →← Back to My Example
Invent and Simplify
Led Cash Debrief Automation — removed manual entry, added shipment-level validation, deployed reconciliation runs every 2-3 hours. Reduced closure TAT from 2.19 to 0.21 days with 100% adoption. Built D+1 cancellation mechanism resolving 50K+ stuck orders with zero escalations.
Leaders expect and require innovation and invention from their teams and always find ways to simplify. They are externally aware, look for new ideas from everywhere, and are not limited by "not invented here."
View Definition →← Back to My Example
Dive Deep
Identified short cash root cause — associates marking without stakeholder alignment. Introduced mandatory CTL/CRM/OM sign-off and 3-5 day review window. Reduced monthly short cash from ₹5.7 lakh to ₹31,968 — over 90% reduction, significantly lowering CoBW exposure.
Leaders operate at all levels, stay connected to the details, audit frequently, and are skeptical when metrics and anecdote differ. No task is beneath them.
View Definition →← Back to My Example
Insist on the Highest Standards
Revamped the outdated 3-year-old NHT module from scratch, making it mandatory for 10K+ shoppers via MRL Disperz App — achieved 96% completion before Jupiter. Store controllable concession rate dropped from 20% to 12%. Built BRS with 60+ checkpoints that became the standard for every new store opening.
Leaders have relentlessly high standards — many people may think these standards are unreasonably high. Leaders are continually raising the bar and drive their teams to deliver high quality products, services, and processes.
View Definition →← Back to My Example
Learn and Be Curious
Self-taught Asana project management to replace email-heavy NSO coordination across 7 stakeholder teams — enabled zero-blocker launches for 148 stores. Explored Tan90 gel pad technology to reduce freezer costs, partnered with UFF ACES for pilot. Leveraged Generative AI tools to build operational dashboards and automate reporting workflows.
Leaders are never done learning and always seek to improve themselves. They are curious about new possibilities and act to explore them.
View Definition →← Back to My Example

Pre-Amazon Journey
Where it all started
Supply Chain Executive — Outbound Logistics
Mahindra Logistics Ltd
Mumbai📅 Aug 2018 – Aug 2020

Managed outbound logistics for Mahindra & Mahindra's automotive division. Oversaw vehicle movement tracking (GPS/Non-GPS), route performance optimization, and fleet management of 150+ transporters. Drove OTD performance from 75% to 95% for Nashik plant. Created SOPs for the MLL Auto Outbound Process.

MIS Officer — Credit Cards & Personal Loans
ICICI Bank Ltd
Mumbai📅 Jun 2016 – Aug 2018

Managed MIS for Credit Cards, Personal Loans (Unsecured) & Business Loans (Secured) across West Mega Zone. Drove CC and PL business through ICICI Bank branches, initiated promotional schemes, and structured innovative deals in working capital and project finance. Received appreciation from Zonal Head for driving March 2018 sales.

Customer Service Professional
Sitel India Pvt Ltd
Mumbai📅 May 2015 – Mar 2016

Handled ICICI Lombard Health Insurance outbound sales. Managed end-to-end sales cycle from lead generation to policy conversion, consistently achieving monthly targets. Cross-sold health insurance products across the portfolio.
